items.name: xiaoyan-ai-dev-assistant
items.description: 智能效研 AI 研发助手是一款基于 RAG 混合检索与多轮记忆的团队研发知识库问答系统，帮助团队快速检索文档、理解项目背景并提升研发协作效率。

items.name: oh-my-skills
items.description: A curated collection of reusable skills for AI coding assistants

items.name: cord
items.description: Cord — distributed agent fabric for LLMs, MCP servers and AI agents. Discover any LLM CLI / HTTP backend / MCP server across machines via natural-language semantic search. Built in Rust.

items.name: Medivault--next-generation-patient-portal
items.description: A next-generation patient portal and medical registry system featuring AI-powered medical document analysis (Gemini), rapid patient summaries (Groq), ABHA QR integration, and secure specialist booking.

items.name: Healthsync-AI-powered-EMR-platform
items.description: An AI-powered EMR platform with ICD-11 integration, real-time collaboration and instant access to medical research.

items.name: neuro-nav
items.description: The Developer's Micro-OS — Context management, semantic search, and AI-powered browsing for software engineers.

items.name: Visiomaster
items.description: 参考 ppt-master 思路构建的 Visio 图形重建工具包，将流程图、架构图和论文模块图从图片重建为可编辑 .vsdx，并导出 SVG/PNG。
